description: Multi-agent MedQA system with RAG and cross-session memory — LM Studio local models, English textbooks, markdown-based memory, multi-source evaluation

features.name: Add LangChain Dependencies
features.description: Add langchain, langchain-chroma, langchain-text-splitters, and langchain-openai to pyproject.toml for RAG and LM Studio integration

features.name: LM Studio Connectivity Check
features.description: Verify LM Studio is running at localhost:1234, list available models via GET /v1/models, and confirm embedding endpoint works

features.name: LM Studio Chat Model Integration
features.description: Configure init_chat_model with model_provider='openai', base_url='http://localhost:1234/v1', and verify model name from LM Studio

features.name: LM Studio Embeddings Integration
features.description: Configure OpenAIEmbeddings with base_url='http://localhost:1234/v1' and verify embedding model produces vectors

features.name: English Textbook Loader
features.description: Create TextLoader pipeline for 17 English textbooks in datasets/textbooks/en/*.txt with metadata (source filename, page)

features.name: Recursive Text Splitter
features.description: Configure RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter with chunk_size=768, overlap=128 for medical textbook content

features.name: Chroma Vector Store Initialization
features.description: Initialize Chroma vector store with collection_name='medqa_textbooks', embedding_function=LM Studio embeddings, persist_directory='./vector_store/'

features.name: Textbook Indexing Pipeline
features.description: One-time indexing of all 17 English textbooks: Load -> Split -> Embed -> Store in Chroma

features.name: Retrieve Medical Context Tool
features.description: Create retrieve_medical_context tool wrapping vectorstore.similarity_search(query, k=5) with source attribution formatting

features.name: Memory Manager (Markdown-based)
features.description: Create MemoryManager class with session/, concepts/, agents/ directories for cross-session markdown file persistence

features.name: Memory: Save Conversation
features.description: Implement save_conversation() to append Q&A to session/{session_id}/conversation.md with sources consulted

features.name: Memory: Save Reasoning
features.description: Implement save_reasoning() to write agent reasoning notes to session/{session_id}/reasoning.md

features.name: Memory: Load Session Context
features.description: Implement load_session_context() to read all markdown files for a given session_id

features.name: Memory: Concept Knowledge Base
features.description: Implement save_concept() and retrieve_concepts() for medical concept KB in concepts/ directory

features.name: DeepAgentState: Add Vector Store
features.description: Extend DeepAgentState in state.py to include vector_store field for RAG retrieval

features.name: DeepAgentState: Add Memory Manager
features.description: Extend DeepAgentState in state.py to include memory field for MemoryManager instance

features.name: Agent: Query Processor
features.description: Define query_processor agent prompt and role — decomposes MedQA question into search tasks, uses retrieve_medical_context tool

features.name: Agent: RAG Searcher
features.description: Define rag_searcher agent prompt and role — performs vector similarity search, gathers context from multiple textbooks

features.name: Agent: Answer Generator
features.description: Define answer_generator agent prompt and role — synthesizes retrieved textbook content into coherent medical answer

features.name: Agent: Evaluator
features.description: Define evaluator agent prompt and role — checks answer consistency against multiple textbook sources, provides confidence score

features.name: Evaluator: Multi-Source Consistency Check
features.description: Implement cross-source verification: evaluator checks if answer agrees across >=2 textbook sources, flags contradictions

features.name: Evaluator: Confidence Scoring
features.description: Implement confidence scoring (1-10) based on source agreement level (high/medium/low) in evaluator output

features.name: Sub-Agent Registration
features.description: Register all 4 agents (query_processor, rag_searcher, answer_generator, evaluator) in task_tool.py subagent registry

features.name: Memory: Cross-Session Persistence
features.description: Verify memory persists across sessions — conversation.md, reasoning.md, and concepts/ survive agent restart

features.name: RAG: Retrieval Quality Check
features.description: Verify retrieved context is relevant to MedQA questions — test similarity_search returns medically relevant chunks

features.name: End-to-End Integration Test
features.description: Full pipeline test: question -> query_processor -> rag_searcher -> answer_generator -> evaluator -> memory save
